title: Egghead Becomes a Buster Call
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Bonney, Atlas, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kuma as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did you hear her shout just now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't hear a thing over these explosions!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That is the reason I made sure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if this is a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The image of you being killed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The idea of your precious daughter dying by your hands...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I couldn't stomach such a tragedy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that each and every clone sharing your appearance...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bonney, they will prioritize your orders above all else, even commands from the world's overseas!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter if the entire planet is against you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KUMA will always, always be on your side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that was the one selfish liberty I took!!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
